input.command:
cd /Users/adrian/IdeaProjects/Soteria/mcp && git add auth.mjs && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Make auth fail-secure when MCP_API_KEY is not configured

Reject all requests if MCP_API_KEY env var is missing, instead of silently
allowing unauthenticated access. Set MCP_AUTH_DISABLED=true to explicitly
opt out for local development.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
